agent_summaries.role_description: Internal inventory, budget, and warehouse capacity analysis via log-linear sales velocity detection.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Identified 14 high-velocity SKUs with exponential sales growth (slope>0.15, R2>0.9) from 237 total SKUs. Confirmed remaining budget of 361,000 TND and available warehouse capacity of 102.42 m3, allowing for strategic bulk procurement.

agent_summaries.role_description: Digital trend validation using internal scraper data and live web search cross-referencing.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Validated Gorpcore, Olive Cargo, Quiet Luxury as still relevant and Mesh Layering as emerging micro-trend with 2-week lead time. Y2K Revival flagged as cooling/late-cycle and correctly excluded from procurement recommendations.

agent_summaries.role_description: Competitor stock-out and pricing gap analysis across TunisTech, SousseStyle, and MedinaModa.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Found 46.7% overall competitor OOS rate on trending items, with critical 66.7% OOS on SKU-1156, SKU-1210, SKU-1233, SKU-1289. Competitor price markups of 4-16% above our ERP cost confirm exploitable supply gaps for prioritized restock.

recommendations.name: Dresses - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Competitors 'SousseStyle' and 'MedinaModa' are currently reporting 80% out-of-stock rates. Procuring to capture abandoned competitor traffic.

recommendations.name: Outerwear - Gorpcore
recommendations.reasoning: Cross-referenced with global trend scrapers: 'Gorpcore' search queries are up 150%. Local competitors haven't reacted yet. First-mover advantage.

recommendations.name: Accessories - Mesh Layering
recommendations.reasoning: Influencer-driven demand spike. Competitor pricing is highly inflated due to scarcity. Procuring at scale to undercut local market.

recommendations.name: Bottoms - Olive Cargo
recommendations.reasoning: Algorithmic forecasting predicts a massive 60% surge in demand next month. Buying now to lock in favorable supplier rates before peak.

recommendations.name: Tops - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Sustained, predictable low-volatility growth (R2=0.94). Safe, high-volume strategic buy to anchor Q4 revenue goals.

recommendations.name: Footwear - Gorpcore
recommendations.reasoning: High profit margin category. Market data indicates willingness to pay has increased by 12%. Locking in inventory to maximize yield.

recommendations.name: Tailored Trousers - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Sustained, predictable low-volatility growth (R2=0.94). Safe, high-volume strategic buy to anchor Q4 revenue goals.

recommendations.name: Jackets - Olive Cargo
recommendations.reasoning: Consistent flagship performer. ERP data shows this SKU accounts for 18% of category revenue. Restocking to maintain 30-day safety stock.

recommendations.name: Tops - Mesh Layering
recommendations.reasoning: Influencer-driven demand spike. Competitor pricing is highly inflated due to scarcity. Procuring at scale to undercut local market.

recommendations.name: Accessories - Gorpcore
recommendations.reasoning: Cross-referenced with global trend scrapers: 'Gorpcore' search queries are up 150%. Local competitors haven't reacted yet. First-mover advantage.

recommendations.name: Knitwear - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Identified sharp 42% MoM sales acceleration in internal ERP. Competitor data shows 15% price markup; local supply gap presents high-margin opportunity.

recommendations.name: Shorts - Olive Cargo
recommendations.reasoning: Consistent flagship performer. ERP data shows this SKU accounts for 18% of category revenue. Restocking to maintain 30-day safety stock.

recommendations.name: Dresses - Mesh Layering
recommendations.reasoning: Emerging micro-trend detected via digital scraping. High engagement but low market saturation. Low-risk test batch procured.

recommendations.name: Pants - Gorpcore
recommendations.reasoning: Technical outerwear demand is surging early this season. ERP indicates we have less than 11 days of cover remaining. Restock critical.
